payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing an inner mesh screen, illuminated interior lamps visible, and a right-side digital control panel with buttons; close-up view (approx. 0.6 m from camera) and the image is slightly low-resolution/blurred.

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"stainless steel microwave front close-up","long_description":"Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing an inner mesh screen, illuminated interior lamps visible, and a right-side digital control panel with buttons; close-up view (approx. 0.6 m from camera) and the image is slightly low-resolution/blurred.","attributes":["stainless steel exterior","rectangular glass window","metal mesh inner screen","right-side digital control panel","visible interior lights","reflective surface","slightly blurred/low-resolution"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
